svn diff

I don't use Lua a whole heck of a ton so it'd be great if some Lua users would chime in that this works for their use case. This works well for me (really just using mail/imapfilter) on 9.3-RELEASE/amd64 and Lua is pretty darn simple and the distfile didn't seem to change a whole lot, hence the simple VERSION bump.
